## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Pure functional implementation (no classes, immutable data)
- [ ] Unit tests with >90% coverage
- [ ] Type safety (passes `bun run typecheck`)
- [ ] Performance meets targets (document benchmarks)
- [ ] Documentation updated

<!-- Brief design notes, data structures, algorithms -->
